nodes.name: ApcCoreEvaluation
nodes.description: Executes the standalone APC computation as a pure stateless function of the input.

inputs.name: x
inputs.constraints: Direct method argument; no stated structural constraints.

outputs.name: apc_result
outputs.constraints: Return value produced solely from x with no persistent state.

nodes.conceptual_summary: Pure Single-Input Functional Mapping. Applies a fixed computational rule to one input object and returns the resulting object without reading or mutating external state. The transform is referentially transparent: identical inputs produce identical outputs, and execution has no side effects beyond value production.. Applications: Physics simulation kernels where one state vector is transformed into a computed diagnostic quantity, Bioinformatics sequence scoring where an encoded sequence is mapped to a scalar or structured compatibility score, Computer vision feature extraction where an image tensor is transformed into a latent representation, Control systems signal processing where an input waveform is mapped to a filtered or transformed output signal
